## Awards, Honors, & Distinctions

1. 2025 — Neurobiology and Changing Ecosystems Fellowship from the Research Corporation for Science Advancement
1. 2022 — UCF College of Sciences Excellence in Research and Creative Activities Celebration Award Recipient
1. 2017 — Mark & Gloria Charness Cognitive Science Award
1. 2017 — Florida State University, Leslie N. Wilson-Delores Auzenne Assistantship
1. 2016 — ASAP (Accessibility and Safety for an Aging Population) Doctoral Fellow Award
1. 2016 — Florida State University, Leslie N. Wilson-Delores Auzenne Assistantship
1. 2015 — Florida State University, Leslie N. Wilson-Delores Auzenne Assistantship
1. 2014 — NIMH Summer Institute in Cognitive Neuroscience Fellowship, UC Santa Barbara
